rule.name: iOS ATS Arbitrary Loads Enabled
rule.vuln_desc: Relaxed ATS permits insecure HTTP traffic and weakens transport security.
rule.developer: Keep ATS strict and scope exceptions minimally.
rule.reviewer: Review Info. plist transport security keys and exception domains. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: iOS Insecure HTTP Exception Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects ATS domain exception allowing insecure HTTP loads.
rule.vuln_desc: Insecure HTTP exceptions may expose sensitive network traffic.
rule.developer: Remove insecure exceptions unless explicitly required and constrained.
rule.reviewer: Review exception domains and validate risk justification. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: iOS URLSession Trust Bypass Pattern
rule.rule_desc: Detects URLSession trust challenge handling patterns indicating bypass risk.
rule.vuln_desc: Improper trust handling can disable effective certificate validation.
rule.developer: Implement strict trust evaluation and pinning where appropriate.
rule.reviewer: Review challenge handlers for unconditional trust decisions. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: iOS WKWebView JavaScript Execution Sink
rule.rule_desc: Detects dynamic JavaScript execution and WebView usage requiring trust review.
rule.vuln_desc: Untrusted script execution can enable XSS/data exposure in app context.
rule.developer: Restrict script injection and content origins in WebView contexts.
rule.reviewer: Audit WebView content sources and JS bridge interactions. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: iOS Pasteboard Usage
rule.vuln_desc: Sensitive data in pasteboard may be accessible outside intended context.
rule.developer: Avoid placing secrets/PII in shared pasteboard.
rule.reviewer: Review pasteboard writes for sensitive data exposure. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: iOS UserDefaults Secret Storage Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely sensitive key material stored in UserDefaults.
rule.vuln_desc: UserDefaults is not appropriate for storing sensitive secrets.
rule.developer: Use Keychain for sensitive tokens and credentials.
rule.reviewer: Inspect local storage choices for sensitive fields. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: iOS Insecure URL Usage
rule.rule_desc: Detects plain HTTP endpoint usage in iOS code/config.
rule.vuln_desc: Cleartext endpoints may expose session and credential data.
rule.developer: Use HTTPS endpoints with strong TLS validation.
rule.reviewer: Audit API endpoint definitions and networking calls. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: iOS Hardcoded Secret Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely hardcoded secret values in iOS-related code.
rule.vuln_desc: Embedded secrets can be extracted from source and binaries.
rule.developer: Use server-side secret handling and secure runtime token exchange.
rule.reviewer: Validate no production credentials are embedded in app code. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
